title: Night Shift Orchard
premise: A dark field where touch plants temporary luminous organisms; the work is experienced, not explained.
visual_law: monospace labels used only as quiet instruments
no cards, dashboards, maps, graphs, product sections, or explanatory funnels
behavioral_law: touch and pointer gestures create organisms
each organism grows, sways, and disappears
sound is optional, gesture-gated, quiet, and generative
the empty field remains a valid complete state
